description: Tracks audit history per target for cooldown logic

wizard.notes: 371 wizard tests passing. All flows at 91-100%: validators 100%, telemetry_helper 100%, dependency_flow 100%, repo_flow 100%, stack_flow 99%, command_builder 97%, cicd_flow 96%, diff_flow 95%, tool_checker 93%, trend_flow 92%, target_configurators 91%.

cli.notes: 1426 CLI tests passing. Fixed TASK-027 (test imports using from tests.conftest) and TASK-028 (test_history_query and test_policy_test API changes). 8 untracked test files now importable.

core.notes: 151 history_db tests + 21 error_recovery tests passing. history_db.py SQL parameterized. get_query_plan() uses f-string but only internal queries. All TASK-020 through TASK-023 resolved.

adapters.notes: 1886 tests passing. All 29 adapters audited. 100%: bandit, gosec, noseyparker, hadolint. 97-99%: trufflehog, zap, syft, semgrep_secrets, semgrep, trivy, shellcheck. All use safe_load_json_file().

reporters.notes: 392 tests passing (1 skip). 26 HTML security tests passing. XSS escaping verified. JSON script injection prevented. CSP headers present.

security.notes: 31 security tests passing (1 skip). shell=True only in tool_checker.py:672 (nosec B602, hardcoded commands). No os.system/popen for injection. yaml.safe_load throughout (14 uses). No eval/exec/pickle. Path traversal protected via _is_safe_path(). SQL injection tests pass. Added pythonpath to pyproject.toml for consistent imports.
